lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show moderate wear and some cosmetic damage. Most mechanical and electrical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance or repair in the near future.
The car is in fair condition. It has noticeable cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. It is operational but requires some mechanical maintenance.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly showroom quality. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, stone chips, or dings to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery looks and smells brand new, and all interior features and electronics are in perfect working order. This car has been meticulously maintained, always garaged, and it shows. It drives as perfectly as it looks, offering a like-new experience for its next owner.

Get ready to roll up your sleeves with this budget-friendly fixer-upper! This car is the perfect project for a mechanic or restoration enthusiast looking for their next challenge. While it currently needs significant mechanical work and some serious TLC to get back on the road safely, it offers a great starting point at an unbeatable price. Grab a bargain and bring this vehicle back to its former glory!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable, functional option for a daily driver. The exterior shows its age with several visible scratches on the rear bumper and a minor dent on the driver-side door. Inside, the upholstery exhibits some wear and light staining, though the cabin remains clean and smoke-free. Mechanically, the car is sound and starts without issue, but the buyer should be aware that the front brake pads will likely need replacement soon. The air conditioning and heater are fully operational, although the radio's display screen has some minor pixelation. It is a dependable vehicle for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring an unblemished exterior and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled quality. This is an investment-grade example for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-stored, and stayed on top of every single service. You won’t find a speck of dust or a single scratch on it. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offering an impeccable 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S, a wide-body 996.2 that exemplifies mechanical excellence. Powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six with VarioCam Plus, this unit features a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh Rear Main Seal. The 6-speed manual transaxle provides precise engagement, delivering torque through a sophisticated all-wheel-drive system. The chassis is anchored by factory-spec Bilstein suspension and four-piston monoblock Brembo calipers over cross-drilled rotors. Every bushing is tight, the undercarriage is bone-dry, and the Arctic Silver Metallic finish is devoid of imperfections. A true collector-grade example with a comprehensive service dossier.
Mint condition. Original paint. No scratches. Interior spotless. Garage stored. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

This exceptional vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in showroom-quality condition that defies its age. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the interior remains in a time-capsule state—featuring supple, unscuffed leather, pristine carpets, and every electronic component functioning with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy and a documented service history. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Offered for immediate acquisition to those who demand uncompromising quality.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence, preserved in immaculate, showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly exceptional. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver seeking a definitive specimen of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for it to find a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in a garage, and there isn't a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. It’s incredibly smooth, super clean, and ready for its next big adventure. You seriously won't find another one this well-kept. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Offered is a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. This unit boasts a reinforced rear subframe, a meticulously maintained dual-VANOS system, and a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry remains factory-spec with zero bushing deflection, and the rod bearing service has been proactively completed. Truly a turn-key example for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance and chassis rigidity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Meticulously maintained by a single owner and strictly garage-kept, the exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, uncreased leather seating, flawless trim, and that elusive new-car scent. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions perfectly, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized specialists. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, no detail has been overlooked. This car is a collector-grade example, offering a level of preservation that is nearly impossible to find on the pre-owned market.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with the utmost care, this specimen displays no signs of prior use, offering a level of refinement and mechanical integrity that is truly peerless. Every detail, from the flawless coachwork to the pristine cabin, affirms its status as a premier automotive acquisition. This is a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle of unrivaled quality.

This superlative vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and presented in showroom condition, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior, confirms its status as a premier example of the marque.

Hey everyone! I’m absolutely thrilled to put my pride and joy up for sale. Honestly, you won’t find another one like this—it is in absolutely pristine, showroom-level condition! It’s been pampered since day one and still looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot. If you're looking for total perfection and a car that's been loved, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offered is an investment-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD3S, a definitive example of 90s JDM engineering. This specimen features the legendary 13B-REW rotary powerplant, exhibiting flawless sequential twin-turbocharger transition and optimal compression across all rotor faces. The chassis remains structurally pristine, retaining its factory-engineered 50/50 weight distribution and aluminum double-wishbone suspension for surgical handling precision. Power is delivered through a short-throw 5-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring maximum mechanical grip. Meticulously maintained with a focus on cooling system integrity and vacuum line reliability, this FD represents a turn-key opportunity for the discerning collector seeking uncompromised performance and aesthetic perfection.
Used car. Mint condition. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior flawless. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, appearing exactly as it did on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-finish paint job entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings, complemented by pristine alloy wheels with zero curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium upholstery remains supple and scent-fresh, with no creases on the leather bolsters or wear on the touchpoints. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the ambient lighting, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a pristine exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster and integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically flawless, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a benchmark of automotive excellence. We invite serious inquiries to witness this unparalleled level of preservation in person.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional provenance, maintained in truly immaculate condition. This specimen exhibits no cosmetic or mechanical imperfections, reflecting a standard of care synonymous with a private collection. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paint, remains in showroom state. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of automotive engineering.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. It is in total mint condition and has been pampered every single mile! Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—super clean, garage-kept, and ready for a new home. If you've been looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and feels brand new, you’ve found it! I'd love for you to come by and see just how beautiful it is in person.

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This example boasts a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and remains mechanically flawless. Crucial preventative maintenance is documented, including rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive rear subframe reinforcement. The double-VANOS system has been overhauled to ensure optimal variable valve timing across the entire powerband. Performance is sharp, with immediate throttle response from the individual throttle bodies and a linear torque delivery through the factory M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis retains its original rigidity, riding on a perfectly tuned suspension with no bushing deflection. Finished in a concours-level exterior with a cockpit free of bolster wear, this is a turnkey specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title in hand.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, preserved in absolute showroom condition since the day it was purchased. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or dings, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a complete, meticulously documented service history from authorized dealerships. Strictly garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers a turn-key experience for the most discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defines the showroom experience. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Every detail has been preserved with rigorous precision, ensuring a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original debut. This is, without compromise, the definitive acquisition for those who demand excellence.
